polls.text: North Carolina U.S. Senate likely voter ballot test, June 1-10 2026, Catawba College/YouGov. Candidate A is the Republican, Michael Whatley; candidate B is the Democrat, Roy Cooper.

Texas U.S. Senate topline ballot test, April 17-20 2026. Candidate A is the Republican, Ken Paxton; candidate B is the Democrat, James Talarico. Topline-only row because Party ID crosstabs were not available in the reviewed public source.

Texas governor topline ballot test, April 17-20 2026. Candidate A is the Republican, Greg Abbott; candidate B is the Democrat, Gina Hinojosa. Topline-only row because Party ID crosstabs were not available in the reviewed public source.

Ohio governor topline ballot test, April 3-9 2026, Echelon Insights for NetChoice. Candidate A is the Republican, Vivek Ramaswamy; candidate B is the Democrat, Amy Acton. Topline-only row because the public PDF did not publish Party ID crosstabs.

Ohio U.S. Senate topline ballot test, April 3-9 2026, Echelon Insights for NetChoice. Candidate A is the Republican, Jon Husted; candidate B is the Democrat, Sherrod Brown. Topline-only row because the public PDF did not publish Party ID crosstabs.

Georgia governor topline ballot test, April 3-9 2026, Echelon Insights for NetChoice. Candidate A is the Republican, Rick Jackson; candidate B is the Democrat, Keisha Lance Bottoms. Topline-only row because the public PDF did not publish Party ID crosstabs.

Georgia U.S. Senate topline ballot test, April 3-9 2026, Echelon Insights for NetChoice. Candidate A is the Republican, Mike Collins; candidate B is the Democrat, Jon Ossoff. Topline-only row because the public PDF did not publish Party ID crosstabs.

Iowa U.S. Senate topline ballot test, April 3-9 2026, Echelon Insights for NetChoice. Candidate A is the Republican, Ashley Hinson; candidate B is the Democrat, Josh Turek. Topline-only row because the public PDF did not publish Party ID crosstabs.

Pennsylvania governor topline ballot test, March 18-29 2026. Candidate A is the Republican, Stacy Garrity; candidate B is the Democrat, Josh Shapiro. Topline-only row because Party ID crosstabs were not available in the reviewed public source.

Texas governor likely voter ballot test, June 21 2026, SoCal Strategies for Red Eagle Politics. Candidate A is the Republican, Greg Abbott; candidate B is the Democrat, Gina Hinojosa. Party ID crosstabs use the linked public workbook's Q5/Q6 Governor table with undecided leaners allocated.

Texas U.S. Senate likely voter ballot test, June 21 2026, SoCal Strategies for Red Eagle Politics. Candidate A is the Republican, Ken Paxton; candidate B is the Democrat, James Talarico. Party ID crosstabs use the linked public workbook's Q7/Q8 Senate table with undecided leaners allocated.

Alaska U.S. Senate likely voter ballot test, June 15-29 2026, New York Times/Siena College. Candidate A is the Republican, Dan Sullivan; candidate B is the Democrat, Mary Peltola. Party ID crosstabs are from the combined Senate ballot including leaners.

Iowa U.S. Senate likely voter ballot test, June 15-27 2026, New York Times/Siena College. Candidate A is the Republican, Ashley Hinson; candidate B is the Democrat, Josh Turek. Party ID crosstabs are from the combined Senate ballot including leaners.
